Just as he's drawing back his board, at the height of his sadistic glee, O'Bannion catches a solid drop of paint on his arm. He holds his swing in mid-arc, dumbfounded. As he stares at the drop, he gets another drop on the head. Confused but curious, he looks upward just in time to see the source of his stunning and thorough drenching in white paint and other junk from above.
